## Description

Describe your change clearly.

## How has this been tested?

List the exact validation steps you used, including commands and relevant output.

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated docs or changelog when needed
- [ ] I ran `make lint` or the relevant validation target
- [ ] I ran a build or explained why it is not applicable
- [ ] I ran a smoke test or explained why it is not applicable
- [ ] I checked whether workflows need adjustment
- [ ] I verified secrets, tokens, passwords, and private hostnames are not logged or committed
- [ ] I updated image version/revision metadata if this changes a published artifact
